original_image_tags: Scan of a dark, typed page with two hole-punches on the left margin. The word "RESTRICTED" is stamped at the top and bottom. A small handwritten "92" is visible in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: A document page containing typed text about a witness sighting of 'flying saucers'. The text reads: 'Witness saw the flying saucers (about seven to ten of them) which flew directly over their home. Said they went like "blue blazes" and didn't make any noise and were headed south. Witness did not report this info. It was reported by Marion Beuscher, a sister. Her address is Menomonee Falls, Wisc. Reported in Amazing Stories, Page 170'. The word 'RESTRICTED' is stamped at the top and bottom of the page.

judge.reason: Both sides agree on the presence of 'RESTRICTED' stamps at top/bottom, but Description A mentions a handwritten '92' not noted in B, while B quotes extensive typed text not mentioned in A, creating an additive but non-contradictory relationship on the visual content.
